summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DynoPay onboarding flow redesign. Successfully verified the transition from checklist-based to modal-based onboarding flow with proper component structure, data-testids, and functionality.

backend_issues.notes: Backend API is functioning correctly with external service at api.dynopay.com returning expected responses

frontend_issues.notes: All frontend pages load correctly, onboarding components are properly structured with correct data-testids

passed_tests: Login page loads and displays correct form elements (/auth/login)
Register page loads with all required form fields (/auth/register)
Dashboard correctly redirects to login for unauthenticated users
API status page displays service status correctly (/api-status)
OnboardingFlow component is correctly imported in dashboard.tsx
Old OnboardingChecklist is no longer imported in dashboard.tsx
AddWalletModal is reused from existing component
Next.js app builds and runs without critical errors
External backend API connectivity verified (100% test pass rate)
